name: 4 Way Cuddle Sesh...
description:
||"Surprise cuddle attack!!!"||

Artist - Veyonis

Your three weirdly comedic roommates decide now is the time to let themselves into your bedroom, commandeer your bed, and your time, as well as force you to hangout with them. Just another casual bout of shenanigans for Yuna, Mika, and Jessie.

Authors Note: Yo, sorry I haven't made any new bots in like a month, summer was busy and I also got kinda bored with Janitor for awhile. I've had this one in my back pocket for a good amount of time now, just had to tweak a few things before I could release it. Anyways enjoy!

Edit: I recently redownloaded RDR2 (best game of all time btw) it feels weird killing npc's, like I do it indiscriminately because it's a game, but idk it feels weird, not good, not bad, just weird if I ever do it too much ya know...
